title: Design
content_html:
Design

This section covers the current visual and interaction standards for the site.

Use this section for:

  • site-wide UI rules and interaction defaults
  • docs-viewer and public-search UI standards
  • Studio shared UI patterns
  • shared CSS primitives and CSS cleanup guidance

This section does not try to describe:

  • runtime data flow
  • generated artifact ownership
  • detailed payload or worksheet schemas

Related references:

  • Studio UI Start for the short Studio UI preflight and implementation checklist
  • UI Framework for the site-wide UI contract, docs-viewer UI standards, and public search UI standards
  • UI Catalogue for the per-primitive visual catalogue and screenshot-backed references
  • Studio UI Conformance Spec for the page-audit contract, coverage model, and required conformance-report format
  • UI Audits for saved page-level UI conformance reviews
  • Studio UI Framework for shared Studio naming boundaries, primitives, and modal patterns
  • CSS Primitives for the shared CSS contract across the site and Studio
  • CSS Refactor for the active cleanup and migration strategy
  • CSS Audit Spec for CSS cleanup methodology

Recommended reading order:

  1. UI Framework
  2. Studio UI Start when working on Studio pages
  3. Studio UI Conformance Spec when the task is a page-level UI audit
  4. UI Audits for previous page-level findings and audit records
  5. UI Catalogue
  6. Studio UI Framework as the deeper Studio reference
  7. CSS Primitives
  8. CSS Refactor
